strengths: Strong SQL and cloud warehouse experience
weaknesses: PM/SDLC experience duration not clearly 3+ years
dbt experience implied but not clearly extensive
Limited stated large-firm consulting or industry-specific background
improvement_bullets: Architected modular ELT workflows using dbt to transform raw data into star schemas, ensuring high-performance, maintainable data models in Snowflake and BigQuery.
Led technical requirement gathering and stakeholder workshops for cross-functional teams, applying Agile methodologies to drive project delivery and SDLC compliance.
Leveraged experience with Databricks and cloud-native warehousing to profile complex datasets, identifying patterns that inform scalable data architecture.
Partnered with business stakeholders to translate complex technical requirements into actionable roadmaps, mirroring the rigorous delivery standards of high-growth consulting environments.
Integrated Salesforce CRM data with external marketing datasets to enable 360-degree customer segmentation and campaign ROI analysis.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Consultant - Data & Analytics opportunity with Qvest US. I am interested in this opportunity because of Qvest’s reputation as a global leader in business and technology transformation for the Media & Entertainment and CPG industries. What interests me about working for Qvest US is its commitment to revolutionizing markets through applied AI and data strategy, which intrigues me because of my own passion for turning complex data ecosystems into clear, profitable business outcomes. I believe my hands-on experience in full-cycle data architecture and my ability to translate technical findings into executive-level strategy would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on the 'single source of truth' principle. In fact, at Shine Masters Cleaning Services, I led the transition from manual reporting to automated Power BI and Looker workflows, standardizing KPIs across the organization. This resulted in a 40% improvement in operational efficiency and a significant reduction in reporting discrepancies, providing the stable data foundation necessary for strategic growth. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Consultant - Data & Analytics role at Qvest US would allow me to bring my data modeling expertise to your client-facing engagements. Additionally, my role as a Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my Agile SDLC and stakeholder collaboration skills. Working on a 14-person team, I collaborated with product managers to align technical features with business objectives, which reduced delivery delays by 25% and ensured production-ready code met shifting project requirements. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python, SQL, and cloud-based warehouse optimization in working on large-scale data projects at Qvest US. I know that my technical versatility and commitment to client success align with what it takes to succeed in the Senior Consultant - Data & Analytics role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
